question_text: Using the less-than ogive in the graph below built from a grouped frequency distribution of marks scored, estimate the median class.

answer_key.explanation: The median corresponds to the class containing n/2 cumulative frequency, which on the ogive lands in the 20–30 interval.
answer_key.related_concept: Median from a cumulative frequency curve

visual.caption: Less-than ogive of student marks.
visual.altText: Cumulative-frequency curve plotted against marks. The horizontal axis shows upper class boundaries from ten to fifty and the vertical axis shows cumulative frequency rising from three to forty.
